## Checklist

- [ ] Plugin loads and activates on a fresh WordPress install
- [ ] Code is PHP 5.3 compatible (no namespaces, traits, short array syntax, or null coalescing)
- [ ] Indentation matches `.editorconfig` (tabs for code, 2 spaces for YAML)
- [ ] Existing prefixes used (`Ai1wm_Debug_` for classes, `AI1WM_DEBUG_` for constants, `ai1wm_debug_` for functions)
- [ ] Manual smoke test of affected tabs and AJAX endpoints
- [ ] CHANGELOG entry added under `[Unreleased]` (if user-visible)
